reviews.review_description: I was slowly going through Youtube, then came across a channel named fingers. I decided to subscribe and play his Gorrila Tag fan game. I noticed a few bugs like, playermodel from VR Chat, and speed is very slow. Overall the game is good as the Developers are trying to fix these issues. Many people have been saying this is a good game also. I have been wondering, may I become a mod? if so, dm me at makingbacon#0001

As a moderator I have seen the good and bad sides of this game, but it is by far one of my favorite games, most of the community is nice, the rest of the staff are amazing and Robert is doing a good job on the game.

Graphics 8/10
Gameplay 9/10
Community 9/10
Staff team (not including myself) 10/10
Game quality 10/10
Total 46/50

But it’s the best game and his name is ankles123

First of all, the game is super laggy. There are basically no cosmetics, and the only cosmetics available are for moderators. The player model isn’t that good and there are barely any maps. It’s difficult to type on the computer (in the game). The game looks fun at first sight, but after playing for 30 minutes it just left me disappointed. Hoping they can improve upon some of these features/bugs in the near future.
